# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Search products by name, category, and price range.
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return \Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse
     */
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category_id' => 'nullable|integer|exists:categories,id',
            'min_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'max_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'sort_by' => 'nullable|in:name,price,created_at,relevance',
            'sort_direction' => 'nullable|in:asc,desc',
            'per_page' => 'nullable|integer|min:1|max:100',
        ]);

        $name = $validated['name'] ?? null;
        $category = $validated['category'] ?? null;
        $categoryId = $validated['category_id'] ?? null;
        $minPrice = $validated['min_price'] ?? null;
        $maxPrice = $validated['max_price'] ?? null;
        $sortBy = $validated['sort_by'] ?? 'relevance';
        $sortDirection = $validated['sort_direction'] ?? 'asc';
        $perPage = $validated['per_page'] ?? 20;

        $bindings = [];
        $conditions = [];
        $selectFields = [
            'p.id',
            'p.name',
            'p.description',
            'p.price',
            'p.sku',
            'p.stock_quantity',
            'p.image_url',
            'p.created_at',
            'c.name as category_name',
            'c.id as category_id',
        ];

        // Base condition: only active products
        $conditions[] = 'p.is_active = 1';

        // Name search using parameterized LIKE with relevance scoring
        if (!empty($name)) {
            $searchTerm = '%' . str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $name) . '%';
            $conditions[] = '(p.name LIKE ? OR p.description LIKE ? OR p.sku LIKE ?)';
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;

            // Add relevance score for sorting
            $exactTerm = str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $name);
            $selectFields[] = DB::raw("
                (
                    CASE
                        WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 100
                        WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 75
                        WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 50
                        WHEN p.description LIKE ? THEN 25
                        ELSE 0
                    END
                ) as relevance_score
            ")->getValue(DB::connection()->getQueryGrammar());

            // We need to handle the relevance score bindings separately
            // since they go into the SELECT clause
            $relevanceBindings = [
                $exactTerm,                    // exact match
                $exactTerm . '%',              // starts with
                '%' . $exactTerm . '%',        // contains in name
                '%' . $exactTerm . '%',        // contains in description
            ];
        }

        // Category filter by name
        if (!empty($category)) {
            $categoryTerm = '%' . str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $category) . '%';
            $conditions[] = 'c.name LIKE ?';
            $bindings[] = $categoryTerm;
        }

        // Category filter by ID
        if (!empty($categoryId)) {
            $conditions[] = '(c.id = ? OR c.parent_id = ?)';
            $bindings[] = $categoryId;
            $bindings[] = $categoryId;
        }

        // Price range filter
        if ($minPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price >= ?';
            $bindings[] = $minPrice;
        }

        if ($maxPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price <= ?';
            $bindings[] = $maxPrice;
        }

        // Validate price range logic
        if ($minPrice !== null && $maxPrice !== null && $minPrice > $maxPrice) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'min_price cannot be greater than max_price.',
            ], 422);
        }

        $whereClause = implode(' AND ', $conditions);

        // Build the SELECT portion
        if (!empty($name)) {
            $selectPart = "
                p.id,
                p.name,
                p.description,
                p.price,
                p.sku,
                p.stock_quantity,
                p.image_url,
                p.created_at,
                c.name as category_name,
                c.id as category_id,
                (
                    CASE
                        WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 100
                        WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 75
                        WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 50
                        WHEN p.description LIKE ? THEN 25
                        ELSE 0
                    END
                ) as relevance_score
            ";
            $allBindings = array_merge($relevanceBindings, $bindings);
        } else {
            $selectPart = "
                p.id,
                p.name,
                p.description,
                p.price,
                p.sku,
                p.stock_quantity,
                p.image_url,
                p.created_at,
                c.name as category_name,
                c.id as category_id,
                0 as relevance_score
            ";
            $allBindings = $bindings;
        }

        // Determine ORDER BY clause
        $orderClause = match ($sortBy) {
            'name' => "p.name {$sortDirection}",
            'price' => "p.price {$sortDirection}",
            'created_at' => "p.created_at {$sortDirection}",
            'relevance' => !empty($name) ? "relevance_score DESC, p.name ASC" : "p.created_at DESC",
            default => "p.created_at DESC",
        };

        // Count query for pagination
        $countSql = "
            SELECT COUNT(*) as total
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            WHERE {$whereClause}
        ";

        $totalCount = DB::selectOne(DB::raw($countSql), $bindings)->total;

        // Main query with pagination
        $offset = ($request->input('page', 1) - 1) * $perPage;

        $sql = "
            SELECT {$selectPart}
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            WHERE {$whereClause}
            ORDER BY {$orderClause}
            LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
        ";

        $allBindings[] = (int) $perPage;
        $allBindings[] = (int) $offset;

        $products = DB::select(DB::raw($sql), $allBindings);

        // Calculate pagination metadata
        $currentPage = (int) $request->input('page', 1);
        $lastPage = (int) ceil($totalCount / $perPage);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => [
                'products' => $products,
                'pagination' => [
                    'total' => (int) $totalCount,
                    'per_page' => (int) $perPage,
                    'current_page' => $currentPage,
                    'last_page' => $lastPage,
                    'has_more_pages' => $currentPage < $lastPage,
                ],
                'filters_applied' => array_filter([
                    'name' => $name,
                    'category' => $category,
                    'category_id' => $categoryId,
                    'min_price' => $minPrice,
                    'max_price' => $maxPrice,
                    'sort_by' => $sortBy,
                    'sort_direction' => $sortDirection,
                ], fn($value) => $value !== null),
            ],
        ]);
    }
}
